mnemonics.title: ResNet Blocks
mnemonics.content: ResNet Remembers Residuals: 'Skip connections help networks remember previous features'

acronyms.usage: Remember DenseNet's feature reuse: Dense Every Node Shares Everything

visualTips.visualization: Imagine multiple filter sizes (1x1, 3x3, 5x5) as parallel branches merging into one river

analogies.analogy: Like first sorting mail by zip code (depthwise) then delivering to streets (pointwise)
